name: Blueberry Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
Combine cake mix, eggs, applesauce, and yogurt in a large bowl; mix well.
In a small bowl, toss blueberries in flour to coat; add 2 cups batter and mix well. Pour half of the batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan; top with remaining blueberries.
Combine sugar, cinnamon, and nuts in a small bowl; mix well.
Sprinkle mixture over blueberries. Top with remaining batter. Bake at 350 degrees for about 1 hour. Cool in pan for 15 minutes; invert onto a rack and cool completely. Cut into slices and serve topped with whipped topping, if desired.
